description: Pre-extracted bibliography and labeled hallucination-check cases for live LLM validation.

cases.rationale: The title is real, but the cited coauthor list is mostly for different people; this is a grafted/fabricated-author citation.

reference.venue: Proceedings of the 30th Annual ACM-SIAM Symposium on Discrete Algorithms (SODA)

  actual: Paul Dütting
error_entry.ref_title: Prophet inequalities for independent random variables from an unknown distribution
error_entry.ref_authors_cited: José Correa, Pablo D. A. Foncea, Ruben Hoeksma, Tim Roughgarden

error_entry.ref_venue_cited: Proceedings of the 30th Annual ACM-SIAM Symposium on Discrete Algorithms (SODA)

cases.rationale: The title exists but none of the cited authors are the paper authors.
